title: Zayed City Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Zayed City, with a Z-Score of +3.94. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level, scoring 10.0 out of 10.
body:
The current heat wave in Zayed City is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 12.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is relatively low at 20%, but the wind speed of 7.8 km/h is not sufficient to provide significant relief. 
 The city's infrastructure and residents are under severe stress due to this critical heat wave, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety and minimize damage.
